overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit downtown district. The player character walks past the Delamain corporate building, along busy sidewalks, and through intersections with moderate vehicle traffic in a dense futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate district street with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: camera moves past the stationary Delamain truck and approaches the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet street past the Delamain corporate building, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: large Delamain truck stationary on the street

entered.detail: tall dark building with illuminated Delamain signage
large black armored truck with Delamain branding
tall traffic signal with red light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near the Delamain corporate building in a wide urban street. A large branded truck sits on the wet asphalt as the player walks forward toward a crosswalk. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the distance and the scene is lit by neon signs and streetlights through heavy atmospheric fog.

events.description: moves from open street to covered sidewalk under overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the yellow-tactile paved sidewalk under an overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking opposite direction
group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: covered bus stop with glass panels and seating
yellow textured guidance strip along the walkway
yellow and gray striped road divider

segments.scene_description: The player moves onto a covered sidewalk featuring yellow tactile paving and a transit shelter on the left. The crowd density increases with pedestrians walking in the same direction. The Delamain building exits the frame as the player progresses under an overpass structure.

events.description: player crosses the street at crosswalk while vehicles wait at intersection
turns right at intersection onto narrower street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the Fuyutsuki building, navigating through pedestrian and vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection
black sedan waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: large building with prominent red Fuyutsuki signage
massive screen displaying Body Without Limits advertisement
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a major intersection dominated by the Fuyutsuki corporate building with its distinctive red signage. A massive holographic billboard displays advertisements on the left. The player crosses the street among moderate vehicle traffic including sports cars and sedans, then turns onto a narrower side street.

events.description: slows down approaching a person in a yellow jacket standing near a dumpster

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow sidewalk lined with storefronts, passing close to other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket standing near an orange dumpster
pedestrian in white shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: metal roll-down doors on commercial buildings
large orange waste container on the sidewalk
teal-colored sports car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on a narrow commercial street with closed storefront shutters and parked vehicles. The crowd density increases with pedestrians walking in opposing directions. The player approaches a person in a yellow jacket standing near an orange dumpster at the street edge, with a teal sports car parked nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, fog-shrouded corporate plaza into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a commercial side street. It begins near the Delamain corporate building on a wet urban street, moving past a large branded truck toward a crosswalk under the glow of atmospheric neon signs. As the camera progresses, the open street shifts into a covered sidewalk with tactile paving and a transit shelter, passing under an overpass as the crowd density increases. The scene then expands into a major intersection dominated by the red signage of the Fuyutsuki building and a massive holographic billboard, where the camera weaves through moderate vehicle traffic before turning away from the main road. Finally, the environment narrows into a commercial alley lined with closed storefront shutters and parked cars, ending as the camera approaches a person in a yellow jacket standing near an orange dumpster and a teal sports car.
